title: Mental Health Counselors
description: Counsel and advise individuals and groups to promote optimum mental and emotional health, with an emphasis on prevention. May help individuals deal with a broad range of mental health issues, such as those associated with addictions and substance abuse; family, parenting, and marital problems; stress management; self-esteem; or aging.

tasks.text: Maintain confidentiality of records relating to clients' treatment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Encourage clients to express their feelings and discuss what is happening in their lives, helping them to develop insight into themselves or their relationships.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Counsel clients or patients, individually or in group sessions, to assist in overcoming dependencies, adjusting to life, or making changes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform crisis interventions to help ensure the safety of the patients and others.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Fill out and maintain client-related paperwork, including federal- and state-mandated forms, client diagnostic records, and progress notes.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Assess patients for risk of suicide attempts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform crisis interventions with clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Guide clients in the development of skills or strategies for dealing with their problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare and maintain all required treatment records and reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Develop and implement treatment plans based on clinical experience and knowledge.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collect information about clients through interviews, observation, or tests.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Modify treatment activities or approaches as needed to comply with changes in clients' status.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate the effectiveness of counseling programs on clients' progress in resolving identified problems and moving towards defined objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Evaluate clients' physical or mental condition, based on review of client information.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Supervise other counselors, social service staff, assistants, or graduate students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Discuss with individual patients their plans for life after leaving therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Refer patients, clients, or family members to community resources or to specialists as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Act as client advocates to coordinate required services or to resolve emergency problems in crisis situations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with mental health professionals and other staff members to perform clinical assessments or develop treatment plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Learn about new developments in counseling by reading professional literature, attending courses and seminars, or establishing and maintaining contact with other social service agencies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, organize, or lead structured programs of counseling, work, study, recreation, or social activities for clients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Gather information about community mental health needs or resources that could be used in conjunction with therapy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor clients' use of medications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Counsel family members to assist them in understanding, dealing with, or supporting clients or patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or conduct programs to prevent substance abuse or improve community health or counseling services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Meet with families, probation officers, police, or other interested parties to exchange necessary information during the treatment process.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate or direct employee workshops, courses, or training about mental health issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
